subject: Docs Audit: Broken Navigation Links,43 Missing Images, 4 Orphaned Pages
body:
## Documentation Audit —SquadDash `docs/`

> **Scope:** All58Markdown files under `docs/` checked for broken internal links, missing images, orphaned pages, external link health, and accuracy concerns.

---

## 1. Broken Internal Links ·❌ Error

### `docs/SUMMARY.md` — Lines 13–14: Escaped Brackets Break Navigation

Two entries use backslash-escaped brackets, causing them to render as **literal text** rather than hyperlinks in any GitBook-compatible viewer:

```
  *\[VS Tooling](getting-started/VS Tooling.md)← not a link
  * \[Windows Taskbar](getting-started/Windows Taskbar.md)  ← not a link
```

Both target files exist on disk. Fix: remove the leading backslashes.

### `docs/SUMMARY.md` — Line 18: Structural Misplacement

`Stand-alone Installer` is listed under the **Prompts** section (between the `Prompts` heading and `features/prompts.md`) rather than under **Getting Started** where it belongs semantically.

---

## 2. Missing Images · ❌ Error

**43 image files** are referenced in Markdown but do not exist on disk. Grouped by document:

### `docs/getting-started/first-run.md` (3 missing)
| Image reference | Expected path|
|---|---|
| `images/main-window-agent-cards.png` | `docs/getting-started/images/` |
| `images/transcript-panel-open.png` | `docs/getting-started/images/` |
| `images/preferences-dialog-speech.png` | `docs/getting-started/images/` |

### `docs/customization/Tinting and Themes.md` (3 missing)
`images/tint-swatches.png`, `images/tint-menu.png`, `images/accent-offset-menu.png` → `docs/customization/images/`

### `docs/reference/configuration.md` (1 missing)
`images/preferences-dialog-speech-config.png` → `docs/reference/images/`

### `docs/reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md` (1 missing)
`images/tint-menu.png` → `docs/reference/images/`

### `docs/reference/remote-control/setup-local.md` (1 missing)
`../images/rc-qr-code-transcript.png` → `docs/reference/images/`

### `docs/reference/remote-control/setup-ngrok.md` (1 missing)
`../images/rc-preferences-tunnel.png` → `docs/reference/images/`

### `docs/reference/loop-file-templates.md` (1 missing)
`images/loop-settings-options-ui.png` → `docs/reference/images/`

### `docs/reference/loop-file-custom-ui.md` (5 missing)
`loop-custom-ui-bool-checkbox.png`, `loop-custom-ui-enum-dropdown.png`, `loop-custom-ui-group-header.png`, `loop-custom-ui-text-input.png`, `loop-custom-ui-full-example.png` → `docs/reference/images/`

### `docs/panels/Tasks.md` (2 missing)
`images/tasks-panel-filter.png`, `images/tasks-filter-at-intellisense.png` → `docs/panels/images/`

### `docs/features/hiring-agents.md` (1 missing)
`images/hire-agent-result-sidebar.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/features/voice-input.md` (2 missing)
`images/voice-input-recording.png`, `images/voice-input-annotation.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/features/text-formatting.md` (3 missing)
`images/text-formatting-inline-code.png`, `images/text-formatting-code-fence.png`, `images/text-formatting-inline-quote.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/features/prompt-queue.md` (5 missing)
`prompt-queue-tabs.png`, `prompt-queue-tab-nav.png`, `prompt-queue-edit.png`, `prompt-queue-priority-feedback.png`, `prompt-queue-paused.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/features/fullscreen-transcript.md` (3 missing)
`fullscreen-view-menu.png`, `fullscreen-transcript-active.png`, `fullscreen-prompt-peek.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/features/entering-prompts.md` (4 missing)
`prompt-input-idle.png`, `prompt-input-abort.png`, `prompt-at-intellisense.png`, `prompt-at-accepted.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/features/attach-clipboard-text.md` (1 missing)
`images/attach-clipboard-text-pill.png` → `docs/features/images/`

### `docs/concepts/agents.md` (2 missing)
`images/agent-cards-main-window.png`, `images/agent-transcript-multi-open.png` → `docs/concepts/images/`

### `docs/concepts/transcripts.md` (2 missing)
`images/transcript-panel-layout.png`, `images/transcript-quick-reply.png` → `docs/concepts/images/`

### `docs/concepts/documentation-panel.md` (1 missing)
`images/screenshot.png` → `docs/concepts/images/`

### `docs/options/` (9 missing — one per options page)
`options-overview.png`, `options-general.png`, `options-speech.png`, `options-custom-model.png`, `options-sounds.png`, `options-sounds-tts.png`, `options-ai.png`, `options-remote-access.png`, `options-notifications.png` → `docs/options/images/` (directory does not exist)

---

## 3. Orphaned Pages · ℹ️ Info

Four files have **zero inbound links** from any page in the docs tree (including SUMMARY.md):

| File | Notes |
|---|---|
| `docs/loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` | Entire `loop-files/` folder absent from SUMMARY.md |
| `docs/decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` | Entire `decisions/` folder absent from SUMMARY.md |
| `docs/decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` | Same|
| `docs/screenshots/README.md` | Only referenced from the orphaned `screenshot-metadata-schema.md` |

These may be working notes or ADRs not intended for publication, or they may have been accidentally left out of navigation.

---

## 4. External Links ·✅ No issues

All 14 external URLs found follow valid patterns (Microsoft, GitHub, Node.js, ngrok, Cloudflare, ntfy.sh, Wikipedia, regex101). No obviously dead or placeholder URLs detected.

---

## 5. Accuracy Concerns · ℹ️ Info

### `docs/.doc-status.json` — Two stale/incorrect entries
- `"getting-started/Access Through Visual Studio.md"` — file does **not** exist (correct file is `VS Tooling.md`)
- `"getting-started/VS Toolong.md"` — **typo** (extra `o`); `VS Tooling.md` is already tracked as a separate correct entry

### `docs/README.md` line 13 — AI-generation disclaimer still present
> *"Note: This documentation is largely AI generated at this point and has not been reviewed."*

This should be removed or updated once the documentation has been reviewed.

### `docs/getting-started/first-run.md` — First-run flow accuracy flagged for review
The documented first-launch flow (auto-installing Squad CLI, calling `squad init`, creating `.squad/team.md`, `.squad/routing.md`, `.squad/config.json`) should be verified against the current WPF application code in `SquadDash/`, given the AI-generated disclaimer above. The instructions for voice input reference a Preferences dialog that also lacks a screenshot.

---

## Summary

| Category | Count | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Broken nav links (escaped brackets) | 2 | ❌ Error |
| SUMMARY.md structural misplacement | 1 |⚠️ Warning |
| Missing image files | 43 | ❌ Error |
| Orphaned pages | 4 | ℹ️ Info |
| External link issues | 0 | ✅ |
| `.doc-status.json` stale entries | 2 | ℹ️ Info |
| Accuracy concerns flagged for review | 2 | ℹ️ Info |

actions.label: Fix SUMMARY.md links
actions.prompt:
In `docs/SUMMARY.md`, fix two issues:

1. Lines 13–14 use backslash-escaped brackets that prevent them from rendering as hyperlinks. Change:
```
  * \[VS Tooling](getting-started/VS Tooling.md)
  * \[Windows Taskbar](getting-started/Windows Taskbar.md)
```
to:
```
  * [VS Tooling](getting-started/VS Tooling.md)
  * [Windows Taskbar](getting-started/Windows Taskbar.md)
```

2. Line 18 places `Stand-alone Installer` inside the Prompts section. Move it to the Getting Started section so it appears alongside Installation, First Run, etc. The line to move is:
```
  * [Stand-alone Installer](getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md)
```
It should appear in the Getting Started block (after `[Hiring Agents]` or after `[Windows Taskbar]`, whichever is more logical).

Also fix `docs/.doc-status.json`: remove the two stale entries `"getting-started/Access Through Visual Studio.md"` and `"getting-started/VS Toolong.md"` (the second is a typo — the correct entry `"getting-started/VS Tooling.md"` already exists).

Do not change any other files. Commit with a clear message.
actions.hint: Fix escaped brackets in SUMMARY.md and stale .doc-status.json entries

actions.label: Review accuracy of first-run docs
actions.prompt:
Review the accuracy of `docs/getting-started/first-run.md` against the actualSquadDash WPF codebase in `D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\SquadDash\`. The doc was AI-generated and has not been reviewed (per `docs/README.md` line 13).

Specifically verify:
1. The documented first-launch flow: does the app actually auto-check for Node.js, auto-install Squad CLI via `npm install`, run `squad init`, and create `.squad/team.md`, `.squad/routing.md`, `.squad/config.json`?
2. The workspace selection flow described in lines 35–43.
3. The voice input setup steps (lines 140–145) — do the Preferences fields described actually exist?
4. The `dotnet run --project SquadDash` launch command (line 18) — is this still valid?

Produce a report of any inaccuracies found. Do not modify any files.
actions.hint: Verify first-run.md accuracy against the WPF application source code

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — no action will be taken
